{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Akura Underlady
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Uncrowned (novel)|Uncrowned]]
}}

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|An [[Akura Underlady]] leads [[Lindon]] to a guest room.<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c3">''Uncrowned'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
